news.t: AllianzIM to Transfer Exchange Listings and Fund Name Changes
AllianzIM Announces New Upside Caps for April Series of U.S. Large Cap Buffered Outcome ETFs with 6 and 12-Month Outcome Periods

overview.description: The AllianzIM U.S. Equity 6 Month Buffer10 Apr/Oct ETF (SIXO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively-managed fund holds options and collateral. SIXO was launched on Sep 30, 2021 and is issued by Allianz.

data.title: AllianzIM Announces New Upside Caps for April Series of U.S. Large Cap Buffered Outcome ETFs with 6 and 12-Month Outcome Periods
data.text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AllianzIM today announces new upside Caps for the April series of its U.S. Large Cap Buffered Outcome Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) suite.
